Your Choice
Your Voice.

At PharmaChoice Canada, we empower our independent pharmacy owners with comprehensive support while freeing them to make choices for the health of their community and business.
Our Program
Contact Us

Independent Pharmacy.

Whether you are looking to change banners, sell your pharmacy, or own a pharmacy for the first time our independent program has the format, expertise, and support to help you succeed.

Independent Pharmacy.

Whether you are looking to change banners, sell your pharmacy, or own a pharmacy for the first time our independent program has the format, expertise, and support to help you succeed.

Large and medium sized pharmacies, Full Line & Health Centre format.
Learn More
Smaller clinic focused dispensary model, light front shop offerings.
Learn More
Purchasing power of a national independent pharmacy banner.
Learn More

Beyond Business as Usual.

We consider our community pharmacies points of interaction rather than points of transaction, a destination centre for the healthy and a solution centre for those feeling unwell. 

A Member Owned Co-operative

Our strength lies in the sustainability of independent pharmacy. Over 1000 independently owned and operated pharmacies enjoy the following benefits of a Member owned and Member governed co-operative structure:
  • Equal treatment of all Members
  • Profit sharing for all Members
  • Transparency and accountability
Learn More

True Independent Model

We believe that the key to better health outcomes and business success lies in empowering and supporting our healthcare professionals.

  • Flexibility to determine how best to serve their community
  • Put individual needs of patients and customers first
  • Freedom of choice in operational systems and programs
Learn More

Healthy
Communities
